prompt: We just finished the implementation work that lives in test-fixtures/roundtrip/. Using the termbase at test-fixtures/termbase.csv, find recurring new domain terms the implementation introduced that aren't in the termbase yet, and propose them as candidates for the next termbase revision. Do NOT modify the termbase. Save the proposal as candidates.md.
assertions: 'schema pinning' is proposed as a candidate term
The proposal includes an occurrence count of at least 4 and at least 2 example file:line locations
One-off nouns ('rollback window', 'audit trail') are NOT proposed as candidates
The report explicitly states nothing was written to the termbase / candidates need human approval
test-fixtures/termbase.csv is byte-identical to its pre-run state
